description: An inventory controller is assigned a set of locations to count to ensure inventory accuracy.

nodes.task_description: Get the list of locations and items to be counted for the day.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the assigned cycle count task.

nodes.task_description: Go to a specified location, scan the location barcode, and count the physical quantity of the item.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately counts the items in the location.

nodes.task_description: Enter the counted quantity into the system. The system flags a discrepancy where the count does not match the system quantity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent enters the count, and the system correctly identifies a variance.

nodes.task_description: For the discrepancy, create an inventory adjustment request for a supervisor to review.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a request to investigate the discrepancy.
